name: @curvenote/task-converter-cloudrun
description: Cloud Run deployment for task-converter service

scripts.build:service: bash -c 'cd ../../packages/task-converter && npm run build && cp -r dist ../../services/task-converter/ && cp package.json ../../services/task-converter/ && ([ -f package-lock.json ] && cp package-lock.json ../../services/task-converter/) && rm -rf ../../services/task-converter/typst-plain && cp -r typst-plain ../../services/task-converter/'
scripts.build:local: npm run build:service && docker build -t task-converter-local .
